items.definition_en: A shirt is a piece of clothing worn on the upper body.
items.example_en: He wore a blue shirt to work.

items.definition_en: Jeans are heavy cotton trousers often worn casually.
items.example_en: She bought new jeans at the mall.

items.definition_en: A dress is a piece of clothing worn by women and girls that covers the body and part or all of the legs.
items.example_en: She chose a red dress for the party.

items.definition_en: A skirt is a piece of clothing for women or girls that hangs from the waist.
items.example_en: The skirt was long and green.

items.definition_en: A jacket is a piece of clothing worn over other clothes, usually for warmth.
items.example_en: He put on his jacket before going out.

items.definition_en: Socks are pieces of clothing worn on your feet inside your shoes.
items.example_en: Her socks had colorful stripes.

items.definition_en: A scarf is a piece of cloth you wear around your neck for warmth or decoration.
items.example_en: He wrapped a scarf around his neck.

items.definition_en: A belt is a strip of leather or cloth worn around the waist.
items.example_en: My belt is too tight.

items.definition_en: A hat is something you wear on your head.
items.example_en: He wore a hat to keep his head warm.

items.definition_en: Gloves are pieces of clothing that cover your hands.
items.example_en: She put on her gloves before going outside.

items.definition_en: A tie is a long, narrow piece of cloth worn around the neck.
items.example_en: He wore a tie to the interview.

items.definition_en: A suit is a set of matching jacket and trousers or skirt.
items.example_en: He bought a new suit for work.

items.definition_en: Shorts are short trousers worn in hot weather or for sport.
items.example_en: He wears shorts in the summer.

items.definition_en: A sweater is a warm knitted piece of clothing for the upper body.
items.example_en: She put on a sweater because it was cold.

items.definition_en: Boots are shoes that cover the foot and ankle and sometimes the leg.
items.example_en: He wore boots in the snow.

items.definition_en: A T-shirt is a simple shirt with short sleeves and no collar.
items.example_en: She bought a new T-shirt at the shop.

items.definition_en: A blouse is a type of shirt worn by women.
items.example_en: The blouse matched her skirt.

items.definition_en: A cap is a soft flat hat with a curved part at the front.
items.example_en: He wears a cap when playing baseball.

items.definition_en: Sneakers are comfortable sports shoes.
items.example_en: She wore sneakers to the gym.

items.definition_en: A watch is a small clock worn on the wrist.
items.example_en: He checked the time on his watch.
